title: Connector integration for smart clothing
abstract: This document describes an interactive object with at least one electronics module and a touch sensor. The interactive object may be a garment, garment accessory, or garment container. The interactive object may be configured to provide at least a haptic, audio, or visual output. The interactive object may also contain conductive threads and a touch sensor containing said conductive threads.
claims: Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container comprising: at least one internal electronics module included within the user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container, the internal electronics module being configured to detect and receive user-inputted actions; a controller configured to receive information from the internal electronics module based upon the user-inputted actions; and at least one output device in communication with the controller, the at least one output device, based on input received from the controller, being configured to provide an output function, the output function comprising one or more of the following: (1) a haptic response in the user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container; (2) an audio response in the user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container; or (3) a visual response in the user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container. 2. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 1, wherein the user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container comprises athletic wear. 3. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 1, wherein the user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container comprises a shoe. 4. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 1, wherein the user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container comprises a hooded garment including a hood, the hooded garment comprising at least one interactive drawstring in communication with the internal electronics module, the at least one output device comprises at least one speaker, the hooded garment further including the at least one speaker and wherein a user-inputted action on the interactive drawstring is detected by the internal electronics module and communicated to the controller, the controller controlling the at least one speaker for providing the audio response. 5. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 4, further comprising a network interface, and wherein the user-inputted action is communicated over a wireless network to the controller via the network interface. 6. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 4, wherein the controller comprises a mobile device. 7. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 4, wherein the at least one interactive drawstring comprises one or more conductive threads that form a capacitive touch sensor, the capacitive touch sensor being in communication with the internal electronics module, the interactive garment being configured to discern different commands based on different touch types with which the user touches the capacitive touch sensor. 8. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 4, wherein the audio response comprises playing music. 9. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 1, wherein the user-interactive garment comprises an article of clothing, the at least one internal electronics module comprising a sensor contained within the article of clothing, wherein motion of the article of clothing by a wearer is detected and communicated to the controller, the at least one output device comprising a display device, and wherein the controller is configured to track movements of the wearer and cause display of information related to the movements on the display device. 10. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 9, wherein the article of clothing comprises one or more shoes and wherein the sensors are contained in the one or more shoes. 11. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 9, wherein the controller is configured to track movements of the wearer during an athletic performance. 12. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 11, wherein the controller is further configured to compare the wearer's athletic performance to a reference performance. 13. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 12, wherein the reference performance is a pre-programmed athletic performance of a professional athlete. 14. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 1, wherein the user-interactive garment comprises the article of clothing, the at least one output device comprising a compression device that provides a haptic response in the article of clothing. 15. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 14, wherein the internal electronics module comprises a touch sensor for detecting and receiving user-inputted actions. 16. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 15, wherein the garment, garment accessory, or garment container comprises an article of clothing, wherein the compression device is located along certain areas of the article of clothing, the compression device being configured to tighten and loosen the article of clothing in the certain areas and wherein the compression device is controlled by the controller for selectively tightening and loosening the article of clothing based upon user input to the touch sensor. 17. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 16, wherein the article of clothing comprises athletic pants. 18. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 16, wherein the article of clothing comprises an athletic bra. 19. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 2, wherein the user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container comprises a shirt having a pair of opposing sleeves, the internal electronics module comprising a sensor and wherein motion of a wearer of the shirt is detected and communicated to the controller, the at least one output device comprising a display device located on one of the sleeves, the controller tracking movements of the wearer and causing the display of information related to the movements on the display device. 20. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 19, wherein the information displayed on the display device comprises a speed of the wearer, a distance the wearer has moved, an amount of time the wearer has been moving, a vital sign of the wearer, or mixtures thereof. 21. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 19, wherein the display device includes light sources, and wherein an intensity of the light sources increases as the distance the wearer moves in the shirt increases. 22. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 1, wherein the user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container comprises the garment container, one of the internal electronics module and controller comprising a global positioning device and being configured to track a location of the garment container over time, the output device comprising a display device configured to display the tracked locations where the garment container has traveled. 23. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 22, wherein the display device is configured to display the locations along a timeline. 24. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 22, wherein the controller comprises a mobile device. 25. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 24, wherein the mobile device includes a camera and wherein the controller is configured to coordinate pictures taken with the camera to locations traveled by the garment container. 26. An interactive object, comprising: an interactive textile portion, wherein the interactive textile portion comprises one or more conductive threads that form a capacitive touch sensor that is configured to detect touch-input from a user; and a controller configured to receive data from the interactive textile portion descriptive of the touch-input from the user and to control an output device to provide an output based at least in part on the touch-input from the user, the output comprising one or more of: a visual output, an audio output, or a haptic output. 27. An interactive object as defined in claim 26, wherein the interactive object comprises a wearable garment. 28. An interactive object as defined in claim 27, wherein the interactive textile portion comprises a drawstring of the wearable garment. 29. An interactive object as defined in claim 26, further comprising: the output device, the output device being physically coupled to the interactive object. 30. An interactive object as defined in claim 29, wherein the output device comprises one or more light emitting diodes embedded in the interactive object, and wherein the controller is configured to control illumination of the light emitting diodes based at least in part on the touch-input from the user. 31. An interactive object as defined in claim 30, wherein the controller is configured to control illumination of the light emitting diodes to provide an indication of one or more of: a current speed, an amount of time associated with a current exercise session, a distance traveled during the current exercise session, a distance remaining until a destination, or one or more vital signs of the user. 32. An interactive object as defined in claim 30, wherein the controller is configured to control illumination of the light emitting diodes to convey textual information. 33. An interactive object as defined in claim 30, wherein the controller is configured to control the light emitting diodes to illuminate according to a pattern that corresponds to a beat of an audio track. 34. An interactive object as defined in claim 29, wherein the output device comprises one or more contractible threads or bands, and wherein the controller is configured to control contraction of the one or more contractible threads or bands based at least in part on the touch-input from the user. 35. An interactive object as defined in claim 27, wherein the touch-input from the user comprises exercise motions performed by the user, and wherein the controller is configured to cause the output device to provide a visual record of exercise data descriptive of the exercise motions. 36. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container comprising: a touch cord comprising a touch sensor, the touch cord being configured to receive touch input from a user; at least one electronics module associated with the user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container, the electronics module being configured to receive user- inputted actions from the touch cord; and at least one output device in communication with the electronics module, the at least one output device, based on input received from the electronics module, being configured to provide an output function, the output function comprising one or more of the following: (1) a haptic response in the user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container; (2) an audio response; or (3) a visual response in the output device, the user- interactive garment, the garment accessory, or the garment container. 37. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 36, wherein the touch cord comprises a capacitive touch sensor. 38. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 36, further comprising a controller configured to receive information from the electronics module based upon touch input received from the touch cord. 39. A user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container as defined in claim 36, wherein the user-interactive garment, garment accessory, or garment container comprises the garment. 40. The garment as defined in claim 39, wherein the touch cord comprises a drawstring. 41. The garment as defined in claim 40, wherein the garment comprises a hooded garment including a hood defining an opening, the drawstring extending from the hood. 42. The garment as defined in claim 41, wherein the at least one output device comprises at least one speaker contained within the hooded garment. 43. The garment as defined in claim 42, wherein touch input from a user on the drawstring controls the at least one speaker for providing the audio response. 44. The garment as defined in claim 40, further comprising a controller configured to receive information from the electronics module based upon touch input received from the touch cord. 45. The garment as defined in claim 44, further comprising a network interface, and wherein touch input received by the drawstring is communicated over a wireless network to the controller via the network interface.
